description_long: This shotgun features a robust, tactical design with a dark, matte black finish accented by deep red-brown panels along the receiver and fore-end. It is equipped with a prominent drum magazine beneath the receiver, suggesting high ammunition capacity. The upper section includes a perforated barrel shroud for heat dissipation and a full-length Picatinny rail for mounting optics or accessories. The rear of the weapon has a skeletal, minimalist stock, and the grip is ergonomically shaped for secure handling. The trigger guard is large and rounded, providing ample space for gloved fingers. Overall, the shotgun exudes a modern, urban combat aesthetic with functional and aggressive styling.
description: A tactical, drum-fed shotgun with a black and red-brown finish, featuring a perforated barrel shroud, Picatinny rail, and skeletal stock.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle, perforated barrel shroud, and the top rail, with the drum magazine partially visible below.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the shotgun, the drum magazine, Picatinny rail, and the skeletal stock.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the skeletal stock, grip, and the circular drum magazine, with the top rail and shroud visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the shotgun's length, drum magazine, and the combination of black and red-brown panels.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with a perforated shroud and full-length top rail
attribute_trigger_guard_design: large, rounded trigger guard with a smooth contour and ample space
